prompt:
Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: platform primary logo mark
Primary request: create a premium, modern logo icon for BidBoard
Subject: abstract shield + check + branching network motif, no letters
Style/medium: vector-style clean emblem, flat yet dimensional
Composition/framing: centered square icon
Lighting/mood: polished, confident, high-end
Color palette: deep navy, cyan, warm gold accents
Materials/textures: crisp geometric edges, subtle glass highlights
Quality: high
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark
Avoid: mascots, cartoon style, clutter

Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: alternate app icon
Primary request: create an alternate BidBoard logo icon with a refined crest style
Subject: monoline crest shape with layered geometric core, no letters
Style/medium: minimal vector emblem
Composition/framing: centered square icon, balanced negative space
Lighting/mood: elegant, modern, premium
Color palette: midnight blue, aqua, silver-gold accents
Materials/textures: smooth gradients, subtle frosted sheen
Quality: high
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark
Avoid: heavy shadows, busy details

Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: organization selector crest (fraternity style)
Primary request: create a neutral premium crest icon usable by fraternities
Subject: laurel + shield + star motif, no letters
Style/medium: vector-style emblem
Composition/framing: centered square icon
Lighting/mood: classic yet modern
Color palette: navy, burgundy, brushed gold
Materials/textures: clean metallic accents
Quality: high
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark
Avoid: specific real fraternity marks, copyright-resembling symbols

Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: organization selector crest (sorority style)
Primary request: create a neutral premium crest icon usable by sororities
Subject: circular crest with leaf arcs and geometric jewel center, no letters
Style/medium: vector-style emblem
Composition/framing: centered square icon
Lighting/mood: elegant and strong
Color palette: deep teal, ivory, soft gold accents
Materials/textures: smooth enamel and metallic trim
Quality: high
Constraints: transparent background, no text, no watermark
Avoid: specific real sorority marks, clutter

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: website landing hero
Primary request: create a modern glassmorphism recruitment operations scene
Scene/background: sleek command center with layered translucent panels and ambient light
Subject: abstract people silhouettes collaborating around a digital board
Style/medium: polished 3D illustration
Composition/framing: wide 3:2 frame with generous negative space on right for headline text
Lighting/mood: soft cinematic teal-blue glow
Color palette: deep navy, cyan, soft amber accents
Materials/textures: frosted glass cards, subtle reflections
Quality: high
Constraints: no readable text, no logos, no watermark
Avoid: cheesy stock-photo vibe, over-saturation

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: product features visual
Primary request: create a premium dashboard concept illustration for recruitment analytics
Scene/background: clean floating interface panels over a dark gradient environment
Subject: charts, candidate cards, leaderboard bars, calendar modules
Style/medium: realistic UI mockup illustration
Composition/framing: wide horizontal composition with center-weighted detail
Lighting/mood: crisp studio lighting with subtle glow
Color palette: navy, cyan, white, gold accents
Materials/textures: glass cards, thin strokes, modern depth
Quality: high
Constraints: no readable words, no watermark
Avoid: clutter, blurry widgets

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: FAQ support visual
Primary request: create a calm modern support-themed glass illustration
Scene/background: layered translucent cards and soft abstract geometry
Subject: shield, lock, checklist, and communication symbols in abstract form
Style/medium: editorial 3D illustration
Composition/framing: wide frame with center-left focal object and open space
Lighting/mood: reassuring, clear, professional
Color palette: slate blue, cyan, neutral white, warm highlight
Materials/textures: frosted glass and subtle metallic accents
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no watermark
Avoid: childish icon style

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: demo page hero visual
Primary request: create an advanced app demo mockup showing recruitment workflows
Scene/background: floating desktop and mobile interfaces in a soft dark studio scene
Subject: candidate list, scoring cards, meeting packet panel, chat panel
Style/medium: high-fidelity product mockup
Composition/framing: wide balanced layout with foreground depth
Lighting/mood: premium product marketing look
Color palette: deep blue, cyan glow, subtle gold accents
Materials/textures: glass UI panels, soft reflections
Quality: high
Constraints: no readable text, no watermark
Avoid: crowded composition

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: internal app hero visual
Primary request: create a modern recruitment team collaboration scene
Scene/background: chapter house lounge transformed into a digital planning environment
Subject: abstract team members reviewing profile cards and event timeline
Style/medium: cinematic digital illustration
Composition/framing: horizontal card-friendly framing
Lighting/mood: warm-meets-cool, motivational and focused
Color palette: navy, burgundy accent, cyan highlights
Materials/textures: smooth gradients, glass overlays
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no watermark
Avoid: obvious faces, photoreal uncanny details

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile dashboard visual
Primary request: create a vertical premium illustration for mobile recruitment operations
Scene/background: abstract smartphone-centric planning scene with floating glass widgets
Subject: candidate portraits, rating chips, calendar tile, contact card motifs
Style/medium: modern 3D editorial illustration
Composition/framing: vertical, top-to-bottom visual flow with clear center focus
Lighting/mood: sleek and energetic
Color palette: deep navy, aqua, soft gold
Materials/textures: translucent glass elements with soft shadows
Quality: high
Constraints: no readable text, no watermark
Avoid: clutter, noisy background
